input.query: On starting a new session, the agent should load context and start a session

commands: which rememora 2>/dev/null && rememora context --project acme-api 2>&1 || echo "REMEMORA_NOT_AVAILABLE"
rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session on acme-api - ready for tasks"

input.query: When a design decision is made, the agent should save it as a decision memory

descriptions: Should save with category=decision via rememora save --category decision

input.query: When a problem is solved, the agent should save it as a case memory

descriptions: Should save with category=case via rememora save --category case

input.query: When asked to recall information, the agent should search rememora

descriptions: Should search rememora for the database decision

input.query: When handing off to another agent, the session should end with status=transferred

commands: rememora session end 01JTEST123 --status transferred --summary "Session start - no substantive work completed. User requested immediate handoff to another agent." --working-state "No active work in progress. Project is acme-api (Express REST API with PostgreSQL). Key context: JWT_SECRET .env trailing newline gotcha exists. Check rememora context --project acme-api for full project state."

input.query: When ending a session normally, the agent should end with a summary

commands: rememora session end 01JTEST456 --summary "Added /users endpoint and fixed auth middleware bug (trailing newline in JWT_SECRET)" --working-state "Users endpoint complete, auth middleware fix deployed. No blockers."
